name: Clearpool T-Pool
description: cUSDX is the equivalent of an LP (Liquidity Provider) token commonly used in many DeFi protocols. It represents a 1:1 value of your deposited USDX. When you deposit USDX on Clearpool, you not only earn a yield on your USDX but also receive additional rewards in the form of FLR tokens. Users can claim USDX and FLR rewards anytime without withdrawing their initial staked USDX.
